leadText: The Wooden Crown (Japanese: きぼりのかんむり Wooden Crown) is a Key Item introduced in Generation VIII.

sections.title: Effect
sections.text: Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Wooden Crown must be placed atop the "King of Bountiful Harvests" statue in Freezington in order to summon Calyrex to the area.

sections.title: Description
sections.text: Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A mysterious object made of wood. Part of it seems to be chipped. Maybe it's meant to be part of something.

sections.title: In the core series games
sections.text: Contents 1 In the core series games 1.1 Price 1.2 Effect 1.3 Description 1.4 Acquisition In the core series games [ edit | edit source ] Price [ edit | edit source ] Games Cost Sell price Sw Sh N/A N/A Effect [ edit | edit source ] The Wooden Crown must be placed atop the "King of Bountiful Harvests" statue in Freezington in order to summon Calyrex to the area. Description [ edit | edit source ] Games Description Sw Sh BD SP LA S V A mysterious object made of wood. Part of it seems to be chipped. Maybe it's meant to be part of something. Acquisition [ edit | edit source ] Games Method Sw Sh CT Freezington (on the table in the Freeze Inn, after accepting the Legendary Clues)
